overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a robust and highly targeted academic presence across Bluesky, LinkedIn, and Mastodon, reaching a combined audience of 3,580 followers. His content consistently focuses on computational social science, disinformation studies, and tool development, generating strong engagement from scholarly and professional communities. While LinkedIn holds the largest audience, Bluesky displays the highest relative interaction rate, indicating a highly active and receptive community for his research and hiring announcements.

contentThemes.description: Research updates, papers, and presentations focusing on coordinated link sharing, information operations, and computational methods to detect digital manipulation.
Job listings, post-doc hiring, and PhD opportunities within his research team, drawing significant interest and sharing.
Technical releases and algorithmic updates for CooRnet, demonstrating active software contribution to the research community.

recommendations: Prioritize Bluesky for immediate research announcements and community discussion, as it currently yields the highest relative engagement rate.
Utilize more specialized hashtags and tags on Mastodon to increase the visibility of technical updates like the CooRnet v2.0 release within decentralized networks.
Include visual assets or direct application links in LinkedIn recruitment posts to leverage the professional network's reach and convert high impressions into candidates.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky is the most interactive channel with an average engagement rate of 6.14%. It shows exceptional resonance with academic announcements and academic recruitment.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon provides a highly specialized audience (4.55% average engagement), responding particularly well to functional software updates and technical methodology discussions.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn serves as the primary distribution hub with 1,850 followers and a steady 4.87% average engagement rate. It is the ideal platform for high-visibility professional milestones, such as major research grants and hiring.

topPerformingContent.content: Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
New research opportunity for PhD students interested in computational social science. Reply for details!
Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.
